Graph embedding

Prerequisites

You need to install the following packages for this demo

using Pkg
Pkg.add(["DataDeps", "MatrixMarket"])

We will work with the optdigits_10NN graph, from SuiteSparse Matrix Collection. First, we will define a data dependency, to easily download and open the MTX file. 

using DataDeps, MatrixMarket

register(DataDep("optdigits",
               """
       ML_Graph: adjacency matrices from machine learning datasets, Olaf
       Schenk.  D.  Pasadakis,  C.  L.  Alappat,  O.  Schenk,  and  G.
       Wellein, "K-way p-spectral clustering on Grassmann manifolds," 2020.
       https://arxiv.org/abs/2008.13210

       Graph: optdigits_10NN Classes: 10

       See https://sparse.tamu.edu/ML_Graph/optdigits_10NN
               """,
               "https://suitesparse-collection-website.herokuapp.com/MM/ML_Graph/optdigits_10NN.tar.gz",
               "336949bf9a2ac3a0643a8d7a2217792f52e0fdbec54e1b870079f257f200abfc",
               post_fetch_method = unpack
))

A = MatrixMarket.mmread( datadep"optdigits/optdigits_10NN/optdigits_10NN.mtx" );
L = vec( MatrixMarket.mmread( datadep"optdigits/optdigits_10NN/optdigits_10NN_label.mtx" ) );
L = Int.( L );
7-Zip (a) [64] 16.02 : Copyright (c) 1999-2016 Igor Pavlov : 2016-05-21
p7zip Version 16.02 (locale=C.UTF-8,Utf16=on,HugeFiles=on,64 bits,2 CPUs Intel(R) Xeon(R) CPU E5-2673 v4 @ 2.30GHz (406F1),ASM,AES-NI)


Extracting archive:
--
Path =
Type = tar
Code Page = UTF-8

Everything is Ok

Files: 2
Size:       1166313
Compressed: 10752

We will now embed the graph using SG-t-SNE-Π

using SGtSNEpi, Random

# reproducible results
Random.seed!(0);
Y0 = 0.01 * randn( size(A,1), 2 );

Y = sgtsnepi(A; Y0 = Y0);
Number of vertices: 5620
Embedding dimensions: 2
Rescaling parameter λ: 10
Early exag. multiplier α: 12
Maximum iterations: 1000
Early exag. iterations: 250
Learning rate: 200
Box side length h: 0.7
Drop edges originating from leaf nodes? 0
Number of processes: 2
5620 out of 5620 nodes already stochastic
m = 5620 | n = 5620 | nnz = 79650
Working with double precision
Iteration 1: error is 101.869
Iteration 50: error is 94.895 (50 iterations in 0.099324 seconds)
Iteration 100: error is 82.6683 (50 iterations in 0.100721 seconds)
Iteration 150: error is 79.8504 (50 iterations in 0.093793 seconds)

Iteration 250: error is 4.02387 (50 iterations in 0.099089 seconds)
Iteration 300: error is 3.18402 (50 iterations in 0.132877 seconds)
Iteration 350: error is 2.7738 (50 iterations in 0.201881 seconds)
Iteration 400: error is 2.54881 (50 iterations in 0.248046 seconds)
Iteration 450: error is 2.40899 (50 iterations in 0.316336 seconds)

Iteration 550: error is 2.24686 (50 iterations in 0.487171 seconds)
Iteration 600: error is 2.19768 (50 iterations in 0.633665 seconds)

Visualization

To reproduce the next steps, we need to install the following packages

Pkg.add(["CairoMakie", "Colors"])

Show embedding

Finally, we show the embedding, using the provided visualization function

using CairoMakie, Colors, LinearAlgebra

show_embedding( Y, L ; A = A, res = (2000, 2000) )

Clean-up

Remove the data by issuing

rm(datadep"optdigits"; recursive=true)
